Author: Wakabayashi, M. et al.
Title: Loneliness and Increased Hazardous Alcohol Use: Data from a Nationwide Internet Survey with 1-Year Follow-Up
Outcome: Change from non-high-risk drinking to hogh-or-over-risk drinking (controll: age, sex, education, job, income, marterial status, living arrangement, smoking, +psychological distress)

Author: Yang, T. et al.
Title: County social isolation and opioid use disorder among older adults: A longitudinal analysis of Medicare data, 2013–2018
Outcome: opioid use disorder (controll: disadvantage Index, Income Inequality, % of pop in primary industry, dual medicare and medicaid, + HCC score, physical comorbidity, mental comorbidity, years)

Author: Walsh, B. & Schlauch, R.
Title: Differential impact of emotional and social loneliness on daily alcohol consumption in individuals with alcohol use disorder
group: non-treatment-seeking individuals with alcohol ose disorder

Author: Rhew, I. C. et al.
Title: The Longitudinal Relationship of Loneliness With Frequency and Problematic Use of Alcohol and Cannabis Among Young Adults
Time_Period: Loneliness assessed at ages 21 and 23 years; outcomes assessed at ages 23 and 26 years (lag: 2–3 years)
Age: Young adults; modal ages 21, 23, and 26 years
group: Community sample from the Community Youth Development Study
Statistic_Model: Marginal Structural Model (IPW-weighted modified Poisson GEE)

Author: Baek, S.-U. & Yoon, J.-H.
Title: Association between social frailty and problematic alcohol use among middle-aged and older adults: findings from a longitudinal study in South Korea
Study_Design: Longitudinal panel study; lagged analysis with 2-year follow-up intervals
Time_Period: 2006–2020 for exposure/covariates; PAU assessed at following wave 2008–2022
group: Middle-aged and older adults from the Korean Longitudinal Study of Aging/KLoSA
Exposure: Loneliness; SF indicator; felt lonely often or most/all of the time during the past week vs rarely/occasionally
Outcome: Subsequent problematic alcohol use/PAU at 2-year follow-up; CAGE score ≥2; unadjusted
Statistic_Model: Lagged generalized estimating equation model with logit link
